g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is ESLint configured for the automation repo?')
sendPrompt('Why is ESLint repeated in CI if it runs pre-push?')
sendPrompt('How does Prettier integrate with the pre-push hook?')
sendPrompt('How is Prettier checked in CI?')
sendPrompt('Why does npm audit run at pre-push and not pre-commit?')
sendPrompt('How does npm audit work as a CI gate?')
sendPrompt('Why is the pre-deploy threshold tightened to critical only?')
sendPrompt('What does Snyk add over npm audit?')
sendPrompt('How does the full Playwright suite run in CI?')
sendPrompt('How should code complexity thresholds be configured in CodeClimate?')
sendPrompt('Why is commitlint enforced in CI rather than as a local hook?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between Renovate and Dependabot?')
sendPrompt('How does conventional-changelog generate the CHANGELOG automatically?')
sendPrompt('What should an environment health check verify before deploying?')
sendPrompt('What branch protection rules should be configured on main?')
sendPrompt('What runs at the pre-deploy gate and why?')
